title: LendaDuels
body:
LendaDuels - The Ultimate Dueling Experience!
Take control of your server's duels with LendaDuels, a feature-rich plugin designed for seamless and customizable player-versus-player combat!
LendaDuels offers a comprehensive suite of tools for server administrators and an engaging experience for players, allowing for fair, organized, and exciting duels.
Core Features:
Advanced Dueling System:
Challenge players to duels with /duel <playername>.
Easy accept/decline system using commands (/acceptduel, /declineduel) or interactive chat messages.
Support for multi-round duels (e.g., Best of 3, Best of 5).
Players can /leave an active duel (resulting in a forfeit) or cancel a pending request/setup.
Customizable Kits:
GUI Kit Editor (/kiteditor): A user-friendly graphical interface for admins to create and modify kits.
Easily drag and drop items into inventory slots, armor slots, and the off-hand slot.
Control panel with Save, Reset, and Cancel options for intuitive editing.
Command-Based Kit Management (/ld kit ...):
Create and delete kits.
Set custom display names with full color code support (including hex &#RRGGBB).
Define kit logos (icons) that appear in selection GUIs.
Set kit contents directly from your inventory (/ld kit setitems) or edit individual slots (/ld kit editslot).
Kits automatically save their full inventory (main, armor, and off-hand).
Arena Management:
Multiple Arenas: Create and manage various duel arenas with distinct spawn points.
Arena-Specific Kit Binding (/ld arena bindkit ...): Optionally bind a specific kit to an arena, forcing that kit to be used for any duels held there.
Block Interaction Control: Configure per-arena whether players can place or break blocks during a duel.
Simple admin commands (/ld arena ...) for creation, spawn setting, and configuration.
Engaging Player Experience:
Kit & Round Selection GUIs: Smooth graphical interfaces for challengers to select a kit and the number of rounds for their duel.
Formatted Duel Request Messages: Clear, multi-line duel request notifications in chat, showing kit, arena (if determined), and rounds, with clickable accept/decline options.
Action Bar Updates: Real-time feedback for duel events and countdowns in the action bar.
Sound Effects: Immersive sounds for various duel actions.
Player Settings (/settings):
Toggle Duel Requests: Players can choose whether they want to receive duel challenges.
Allow Spectating: Players can decide if others are allowed to spectate their duels.
Stats Visibility: Players can control if their duel statistics are publicly viewable.
Settings are saved per player.
Player Statistics (/stats [playername]):
Tracks wins and deaths for each player, broken down by the kit used in the duel.
View your own stats or (if permitted by the target and/or by permission) the stats of other players.
Stats are displayed in a GUI format, showing kit icons and relevant win/loss/KDR information.
Spectator Mode (/spectate <player>, /stopspectate):
Allow players with permission to spectate ongoing duels.
Spectators are put into spectator game mode, teleported to the arena, and are invisible to dueling players.
Original inventory, location, and game mode are saved and restored when spectating ends or the duel finishes.
Spectators cannot interact with the duel or the world.
Configuration & Administration:
Customizable Messages: Nearly all plugin messages are configurable via config.yml, allowing for full localization and server branding. Includes support for a global pluginPrefix.
Configurable Lobby Spawn: Set a central lobby point for players after duels or if an error occurs.
Reload Command (/ld reload): Reloads the plugin's configuration and player data without a full server restart.
Admin Commands (/ld ...): Comprehensive sub-commands for managing arenas, kits, and plugin settings, all permission-controlled.
Player data (settings, stats) is stored in playerdata.yml.
Why Choose LendaDuels?
LendaDuels aims to be a robust, all-in-one solution for servers looking to enhance their PvP community. With its powerful kit editor, flexible arena system, and player-centric features like customizable settings and spectator mode, it provides both administrators and players with the tools they need for an enjoyable and competitive dueling environment.
